---
title: "Md Ragib Rownak"
image: images/profile.jpg
about:
  template: trestles
  image-shape: round
  image-width: 15em
  links:
    - icon: github
      text: GitHub
      href: https://github.com/rownak01
    - icon: envelope
      text: Email
      href: mailto:rownak.1@osu.edu
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://linkedin.com/in/ragibrownak
---

## About Me

<!-- REPLACE this section with your own bio -->

I am a PhD candidate in Mechanical Engineering at The Ohio State University (Center for Automotive Research), specializing in aging-aware optimal control of electrified powertrains. My work bridges physics-based component aging models, transformer-based battery degradation modeling, and learning-based control algorithms to improve the efficiency, reliability, and sustainability of next-generation hybrid and electric vehicles. I have a strong background in control systems, machine learning, and automotive engineering, with a passion for developing innovative solutions to complex problems in the field of electrified transportation. My research aims to advance the state-of-the-art in battery management systems and contribute to the broader goal of sustainable mobility.

## Research Interests

- Artificial intelligence, learning-based control approach, machine learning, and generative AI
- Optimization and control of complex engineering systems
- Data-driven modeling and decision-making for efficiency and safety

## Education

- **[PhD]** in [Mechanical Engineering], [The Ohio State University], [2026 (expected)]
- **[MSc]** in [Mechanical Engineering], [The Ohio State University], [2023]
